_meta.description: D6 fixtures for google-adk / a2ui-recovery (A2UI error recovery, ADK-only)
_meta._note: Backend-owned A2UI (recovery_agent.py, get_a2ui_tool, injectA2UITool=false) with the toolkit validate->retry loop made visible. Same two-stage pattern as gen-ui-declarative: (a) outer agent emits no-arg generate_a2ui (matched by userMessage+context); (b) the inner render_a2ui sub-agent emits the flat A2UI payload (matched by toolName=render_a2ui); (c) outer narration (matched by toolCallId). The recovery loop re-invokes the inner sub-agent per attempt, so the inner render_a2ui calls are discriminated by sequenceIndex (the per-attempt counter). HEAL pill: sequenceIndex 0 emits a structurally-invalid surface (root references a missing child -> unresolved_child) that never paints; the middleware feeds the errors back; sequenceIndex 1 emits a valid surface that paints. EXHAUST pill: a single no-sequenceIndex inner fixture returns invalid for EVERY attempt, so the loop hits maxAttempts (3) and the tool returns the a2ui_recovery_exhausted envelope (renderer shows a 'failed' state). Inner render_a2ui mirrors are ordered BEFORE the outer generate_a2ui fixtures so first-match-wins routes inner traffic to them. Prompts are unique within the google-adk context (no collision with gen-ui-declarative.json). Requires @ag-ui/a2ui-middleware >= 0.0.10 for the lifecycle rendering; recovery loop is ag_ui_adk >= 0.7.0.

fixtures._comment: HEAL pill — inner render_a2ui attempt 0: structurally INVALID (root Column references child 'missing-card' with no matching component). Never paints; errors are fed back to attempt 1.

match.userMessage: Render my Q2 sales dashboard, recovering if the first attempt is malformed.

fixtures._comment: HEAL pill — inner render_a2ui attempt 1: VALID surface that paints after the structural errors from attempt 0 are fed back.

match.userMessage: Render my Q2 sales dashboard, recovering if the first attempt is malformed.

fixtures._comment: HEAL pill — outer agent narration after generate_a2ui returns the (recovered) surface.

response.content: The first render was malformed — I recovered and painted your Q2 dashboard.

fixtures._comment: HEAL pill — outer agent emits generate_a2ui (no args).

match.userMessage: Render my Q2 sales dashboard, recovering if the first attempt is malformed.

fixtures._comment: EXHAUST pill — inner render_a2ui: INVALID on every attempt (no sequenceIndex, so it matches all 3 attempts). Drives the loop to the maxAttempts cap -> a2ui_recovery_exhausted hard-fail envelope.

match.userMessage: Render a dashboard that keeps failing validation so I can see the fallback.

fixtures._comment: EXHAUST pill — outer agent narration after generate_a2ui returns the recovery-exhausted envelope.

response.content: I couldn't produce a valid surface after several attempts — showing a graceful fallback instead.

fixtures._comment: EXHAUST pill — outer agent emits generate_a2ui (no args).

match.userMessage: Render a dashboard that keeps failing validation so I can see the fallback.
